feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited (The recipients are determined automatically.)
entry.content:
Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited.

Previously I could edit the recipients of a workflow, but now I get the message “The recipients are determined automatically.”, and it does not allow to edit the recipients.
What can I do to make the recipients editable?

entry.title: How to update Object list of Maintenance Item by BAPI/Function Module
entry.content: I am not able to find any BAPI/Function module to update Object List of Maintenance Item.

entry.title: Partner function in equipment.
entry.content:
In SAP Public cloud, we have configured new partner function (Install At), the same getting determined in customer master and sales order. While creating delivery and doing PGI, we link serial number to the material (Extras - Serial Numbers - assign the respective serial number).
Need help with the requirement is to have this partner function populated in the partner function for the equipment and should be visible in IE03.

entry.title: Functional location Enhanced search Help
entry.content: Functional location Enhanced search Help is not working, whereas for Equipment it is working

entry.title: SAP EAM Aktivierung in SAP ECC (nicht S/4HANA)
entry.content: Ist das korrekt?: Die Grundfunktionen von SAP EAM sind in ECC (nicht S/4HANA) bereits enthalten und erfordern keine separate Lizenzierung. Die Aktivierung erfolgt über Customizing-Einstellungen im SAP-System. Hierbei können bestehende PM-Funktionen um EAM-spezifische Funktionen erweitert werden.

entry.title: Activation of SAP EAM in SAP ECC (not S/4HANA)
entry.content: Is it correct?: The core functions of SAP EAM are already included in ECC (not S/4HANA) and do not require separate licensing. Activation is done through customizing settings in the SAP ECC system.

entry.title: SAP Plant maintenance Guide
entry.content:
Hello!

Can somebody help me to get SAP Plant Maintenance Guide?

Regards.

entry.title: GRC PC:Risks and Controls SAP PP, SAP PM
entry.content:
Dear All,

I request for Risks and Controls of SAP PP and PM modules for configuration of the same in GRC PC.

i have already been through the sap notes. But they do not specify about these .odules

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Structure list for equipment in PM Order with several equipments
entry.content:
Hello,

In my maintenance order I have several operations that each have a different equipment. When I want to call up the structure list (via the button 'List') in the components tab, it always shows the structure list of the equipment in the header instead of the equipment in the specific operation. Is there a way to get the structure list of the equipment in the operation?

entry.title: How to enable print forms in "Find maintenance orders" F2175?
entry.content:
We're currently transitioning from "Manage notification list" to "Find maintenance orders".
Are we able to enable the shop papers we were using before in this new app?

Documents are pointing to "Work packs" but we would like to print orders as done previously, using shop papers.

entry.title: How to setup work packs in "find maintenance order" F2175?
entry.content:
We're doing the setup of work packs in "Find maintenance order" app and experiencing some issues:

1. Output pack are created but no output status is shown in "Manage work packs" app; it looks like it's not processed

2. It looks like there are some standard output reports that can be printed, but how can we add the reports we're already using as shop papers? E.g. output types I see in SPRO: BREAKDOWN_REPORT; Activity_REPORT;...

entry.title: "Manage work packs" output status is blank
entry.content:
By printing on "Find maintenance order" app, work packs are created but nothing is printed.

When checking "Manage work packs" these are there but output status is blank, so it looks like these not being processed.

entry.title: Assign equipment class automatically when creating serial number/ equipment
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to enable the assignment of the equipment class automatically for serial number/ equipment?
Now the equipment class have been assigned manually in IE02 for all serial numbers. As per our business process we create serial numbers within production order and it would be difficult to assign equipment class manual to every seril number if one of the production order has more than 50-100 pieces.
It would be very helpful if the equipment classes were automatically assigned when the equipment is created. As we find out that for batch classification it is possible to assign the batch class to the material master and then every batch that has been created with this material has automatically batch class gets assigned.

My questions:

  1. Is it possible to assign class automatically to the every serial number/ equipment? If yes, then how?
  2. Is there any other alternative to reduce the above manual work?

I look forward to your feedback and thank you in advance for your support.

Thanks in advance,
Suyog

entry.title: reverse IW8W for refurbishment GR
entry.content:
hello all

SAP ECC6: GR for refurbishment with IW8W sets status DLV to the order.

I reversed the GR by canceling the document with Migo cancellation, generating a Mvt 310.

the issue is that status DLV does not change/disappear and when I try to perform a GR again, with IW8W or MIGO, I get a message that the material has been delivered already and I cannot perform the GR again, even if the material movement in the order shows that the first GR has been reversed.

Is there a way to do that so that I can receive the material again?

entry.title: Field addition in Screen Maintenance Requests app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to add an Equipment Sort Field to Screen Maintenance App.

For this in which view I need to add the field.

Kindly let me know the procedure for to add a field to the app or in which BADI we can add logic.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav.

entry.title: Can Serena business management and Teamcenter integrated to SAP
entry.content:
Business uses Serena Business Management (SBM) to create Engineering change numbers. Later it's manually updated to SAP via CC01. Also, this ECN is used to create BOM and material changes in Teamcenter. But here ECN is not maintained against material but in the diagrams. 
Now I would like to know can the ECN from SBM be moved to Teamcenter as a value against the material or not. Or is it possible to create changes in Teamcenter against the ECN?

Please give your guidance if any.

entry.title: Operations Tab in PM Notification
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Is it possible in SAP PM Notification to have a Tab for Operations, similar to PM Orders.

Also, can we have a checkbox (Manual) in the operations for completion of the operations.

Prashant

entry.title: How to add equipment in logsheet
entry.content:
Equipment was not displayed in the logsheet because, during the equipment transfer process, the location status was mistakenly set to 'dismantled' from 12.11.2024. The equipment's final location was marked as 'installed' only on 28.11.2024. As result, the logsheet does not show data for 16 days.

Please suggest what actions should be taken to resolve this issue.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Plant Connectivity

entry.title: link sales order reservation to refurbishment order
entry.content:
hello Gurus

I have the following scenario: we create a Sales order with a BOM, where the Header does not generate a requirement but the item does.

Our next step is to create a refurbishment order, where the material that generated the requirement is being issued, worked and returned in stock with a different number (the header material).

we link the refurbishment order to the sales order with the existing field in the refurbishment order.

I am trying to achieve the following: when I issue the material in the refurbishment order, I want the open requirement generated from the sales order to disappear from MD04.

is this possible?

entry.title: IP30H : Issue while scheduling maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while scheduling of maintenance plans with IP30H.

Maintenance plans having scheduling indicator is " Time-Key date".

Please help me out.
